response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:00: Identified as intro talk between two VTubers. 2. 03:00-04:35: Song performance of 'Brave Shine'. Resolved metadata: Artist Aimer (Composer: Koyama Hisashi), Performers: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, Tokoyami Towa. 3. Searched 'Brave Shine Aimer lyrics', retrieved complete Japanese and English lyrics, and mapped them to the song's performance structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory chat between Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii, followed by a vocal performance of 'Brave Shine' by Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii converse and interact on stage before the performance begins.
Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa perform 'Brave Shine'. Text on screen indicates original artist/composer information.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, Tokoyami Towa
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
左手に隠した
願いは願いのままで
覚めない幻見てた
右手には空の記憶
誰もしらない世界の果て
やまない雨にうたれていた
守りたいものを守れる強さ
それを信じられなくなる弱さ
すべてを受け入れて
未来を探す
Brave shine
手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night
傷だらけの夜
You save my life
かざした刃の先に想いを重ねた
祈りは時を超えて
Your brave shine...
光ること忘れた
青い星が残してく
消えない影見てた
すれ違う赤の軌道
何も知らない子供のまま
明けない夜を彷徨ってた
失くせないものを失くした弱さ
何も信じられなくなる脆さ
立てなくなっても
運命は進む
Break down
崩れ堕ちてゆく星座が
傷つけあう夜
You're breaking dawn
交わした約束の中に
独りを支えた確かな理想を添えて...
守りたいものを守れるのなら
すべてを受け入れて
未来を探す
夜明けを灯す
Brave shine
手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night
傷だらけの夜
You save my life
重ねた涙の果てに光を見つけた
祈りは時を超えて
My brave shine...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Wishes hidden in my left hand remain as they are
Dreaming of an endless dream
In my right hand, memories of a shell
At the end of a world unknown to anyone
Being struck by the never-ending rain
Strength to protect what I want to protect
Weakness that makes it hard to believe in it
Accepting everything
Searching for tomorrow
Brave shine
If I reach out my hand, there's still
Stay the night
A night full of scars
You save my life
Layering feelings at the tip of the raised blade
Prayers transcend time
Your brave shine...
Forgot to shine
The blue star leaves behind
Watching the unerasable shadow
The passing red trajectory
Like a child who knows nothing
Wandering through the endless night
Weakness of losing what can't be lost
Losing faith in everything
Even if the darkness doesn't stand
Fate moves forward
Break down
The crumbling constellations
Nights where we hurt each other
You're breaking dawn
In the exchanged words
Supporting one another
Accompanied by a certain dream
If I can protect what I want to protect
Accepting everything
Searching for tomorrow
Lighting up the dawn
Brave shine
If I reach out my hand, there's still
Stay the night
A night full of scars
You save my life
Finding light at the end of shed tears
Prayers transcend time
My brave shine...
